prompts.WO-BORROWED-NOSTALGIA: Square product photograph. A worn brown leather wallet lying open on a dark mahogany desk, venetian-blind shadow stripes crossing it. Inside: a faded black-and-white portrait photo of an unknown woman and a folded receipt. Single tungsten lamp from camera left. Near-monochrome palette, deep blacks, cream highlights, shallow depth of field. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-BOTTLED-MORNING: Square product photograph. A small dark glass apothecary bottle sealed with a cork stopper, sitting on a charcoal-grey ceramic saucer. A thin curl of steam or mist rises from a crack in the cork. Venetian-blind shadow bars fall across the surface. Tungsten rim light. Near-monochrome, deep blacks, single warm amber glow inside the bottle. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-CHAOS-SEASONING: Square product photograph. A vintage tin spice shaker, lid askew, lying on its side on a dark slate surface with a small scatter of mixed dried herbs and cracked pepper around it. Hard side-lighting from a narrow tungsten lamp casts long shadows. Near-monochrome palette, charcoal tones, cream highlights. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-COSMIC-MYSTERY-BOX: Square product photograph. A small black lacquered wooden box with a tarnished brass latch, closed, resting on a dark wool cloth. A faint violet-tinged light leaks from the seam around the lid. Venetian-blind shadow stripes across the scene. Deep blacks, smoky grey, single scarlet wax seal on the lid. Shallow DOF. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-DEJA-VU-SESSION: Square product photograph. Two identical antique pocket watches, both showing the same time, placed side by side on a dark felt-lined tray. One is face-up, one is face-down. Single tungsten lamp from 45 degrees casts crisp shadows. Near-monochrome, cream watch faces, deep charcoal background. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-DISCOUNT-GRAVITY: Square product photograph. A brass plumb bob on a frayed string, suspended motionless above a cracked dark concrete surface, casting a precise shadow directly below. Narrow overhead tungsten beam. Near-monochrome, charcoal and cream palette, tarnished brass catch the only warm light. Square crop. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-DREAD-REPELLENT: Square product photograph. A compact dark-glass spray bottle with a brushed-metal nozzle sitting upright on a rain-slicked black surface. Fine mist particles catch a single side light. Venetian-blind shadow stripes cross the background. Near-monochrome, deep blacks, cream mist highlights. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-FOG-IN-BOTTLE: Square product photograph. A wide-mouth clear glass jar tightly sealed with a metal lid, dense white fog swirling visibly inside it. Placed on dark weathered wood planks. Single tungsten lamp from the side catches the fog's motion. Near-monochrome palette, deep blacks, luminous white interior. Shallow DOF. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-FORBIDDEN-HONEY: Square product photograph. A small hexagonal dark glass jar filled with deep amber honey, lid sealed with a scarlet wax stamp. Placed on a dark ceramic tile with a single wooden honey dipper beside it. Venetian-blind shadows cross the scene. Near-monochrome except the warm amber and scarlet accent. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-GENTLY-USED-LUCK: Square product photograph. A worn four-leaf clover pressed and mounted under cracked glass in a small tarnished brass frame, lying flat on aged newsprint. Single tungsten lamp rakes across the surface revealing texture. Near-monochrome palette, deep blacks, cream paper tones. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-HANDCRAFTED-ECHO: Square product photograph. A vintage reel-to-reel tape spool lying flat on a dark felt surface, one end of the magnetic tape unspooled slightly. Single tungsten side lamp catches the metallic sheen. Near-monochrome, charcoal and silver tones, deep black background. Shallow depth of field. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-HAUNTED-CANDLE: Square product photograph. A thick black pillar candle burning on a tarnished pewter holder, a single long flame flickering, wax drips hardened on the sides. Dark background, venetian-blind shadow stripes on the wall behind. The flame the only warm light source. Near-monochrome with scarlet flame glow. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-IMAGINARY-DEED: Square product photograph. A rolled parchment scroll tied with a scarlet ribbon, resting on a dark leather blotter. A vintage fountain pen lies beside it uncapped. Single overhead tungsten lamp. Near-monochrome, aged cream parchment, scarlet ribbon accent, deep black shadows. Shallow DOF. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-INTERDIM-BAZAAR: Square product photograph. A collection of small mismatched curios — a brass key, a glass eye, a tiny compass — arranged on dark velvet inside an open shadow-box frame. Single angled tungsten lamp. Near-monochrome, tarnished metal highlights, deep black velvet. Venetian-blind shadow bars across top. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-INVISIBLE-UMBRELLA: Square product photograph. A classic black umbrella handle — polished dark wood crook — resting against a charcoal wall, umbrella canopy absent. The handle casts a sharp shadow on the floor. Single tungsten side light. Near-monochrome, deep blacks and charcoal, cream highlight on the wood grain. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-LEFT-SOCK: Square product photograph. A single dark charcoal wool dress sock, neatly folded, resting on a dark mahogany surface. A tarnished silver collar clip placed beside it as a companion object. Venetian-blind shadow stripes fall across the scene. Near-monochrome palette, tungsten side lighting. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-LOST-RECIPE-TIME: Square product photograph. A handwritten recipe card, ink faded and edges browned, pinned to a dark cork board with a single brass tack. A cracked glass measuring cup nearby. Single tungsten lamp from below-left rakes across the textures. Near-monochrome, cream paper, charcoal shadows. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-MEMORY-FOAM-MEMORY: Square product photograph. A small rectangular block of dense cream-coloured foam with a single thumb indentation preserved in its surface, sitting on dark slate. A black-and-white photograph partially tucked beneath it. Single side tungsten lamp. Near-monochrome, cream foam, deep black background. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-MONDAY-KIT: Square product photograph. A worn black leather roll-up kit partially unrolled on a dark surface, revealing a small flask, a folded newspaper, and a dull brass tin. Single tungsten lamp from camera right, venetian-blind shadows. Near-monochrome, deep blacks, cream newspaper highlights, tarnished brass. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-MOON-DUST: Square product photograph. A small open tin container filled with fine silver-grey powder, a tiny antique measuring spoon resting across the top. Placed on black velvet. Single narrow overhead tungsten beam catches the powder's luminous shimmer. Near-monochrome, silver dust glow, deep black background. Shallow DOF. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-ONE-HAND-CLAPPING: Square product photograph. A single dark leather glove, palm up, fingers slightly curled, resting alone on a charcoal surface. A narrow tungsten slit light from one side creates stark shadows in the finger joints. Near-monochrome, deep blacks, cream leather highlight stitching. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-POCKET-THUNDER: Square product photograph. A small brushed-steel cylindrical capsule sealed at both ends, resting on its side on a dark leather surface. Faint electrical arc visible through a tiny window at one end. Single tungsten side lamp. Near-monochrome except a scarlet arc glow. Venetian-blind shadow stripes. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-PORTABLE-HOLE: Square product photograph. A perfect circle of matte black velvet, roughly six inches in diameter, lying flat on a dark wooden desk surface. The velvet circle appears to absorb all light, creating an unsettling depth. A brass ruler lies beside it. Single tungsten lamp. Near-monochrome. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-SENSORY-STARTER: Square product photograph. A compact black tin case, hinged open, lined with dark grey foam cut-outs holding a tiny tuning fork, a swatch of rough burlap, and a vial of clear liquid. Single tungsten overhead lamp. Near-monochrome, charcoal foam, silver metal. Venetian-blind shadows. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-SILENCE-JAR: Square product photograph. A tall clear glass mason jar with a tight metal lid, completely empty but sealed, on a dark stone surface. The jar's interior appears unnaturally still. A single tungsten lamp from the side creates a sharp specular reflection down the glass. Near-monochrome. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-SPARE-KEY-NOWHERE: Square product photograph. A single large antique brass skeleton key lying on a dark wooden surface, no keyring attached. A folded piece of paper beneath it. Single tungsten lamp rakes across at a low angle casting a long key shadow. Near-monochrome, tarnished brass warm glow, deep black background. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-SPARE-TUESDAY: Square product photograph. A small vintage desk calendar block showing a generic mid-week date, its pages dog-eared, resting on a dark felt blotter beside a pencil stub. Venetian-blind shadow stripes fall across the calendar. Tungsten side light. Near-monochrome, cream paper, charcoal shadows. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-TANGIBLE-WIFI: Square product photograph. A tangle of vintage braided copper wire formed deliberately into concentric arcs on a dark slate surface, resembling a signal broadcast symbol. Single narrow tungsten side lamp. Near-monochrome, copper warm tones against deep black slate. Venetian-blind shadow stripes above. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-VOID-SAMPLER: Square product photograph. A small dark matte black ceramic tasting bowl, empty and perfectly clean, on an aged charcoal linen cloth. A tiny obsidian spoon rests inside it. Single overhead tungsten lamp creates a single highlight inside the bowl. Near-monochrome, all blacks and charcoals with cream specular. Photorealistic, no text.
prompts.WO-WHISPERING-STONE: Square product photograph. A smooth river stone, dark grey, resting on a dark wooden surface with a small wax seal stamp pressed into softened wax on one face. A single tungsten lamp from the side catches the stone's surface texture. Near-monochrome, scarlet wax accent, deep blacks. Shallow DOF. Photorealistic, no text.
